Intent Design strategy AI skills

Skills Patterns Agents

Design with Intent

A UX strategy system for AI tools. 15 skills covering research, strategy, flows, content, accessibility, ethics, and measurement.

Claude Code claude install-skill ghaida/intent

Also available for Cursor, VS Code Copilot, and manual install

PHILOSOPHY Core thesis

Philosophy

Every design decision should have a reason.

A reason grounded in evidence about the people who will use what you build. One that holds up when you ask who benefits, who's harmed, and what happens at scale. Design without that rigor produces products that work for their makers but fail their users. Intent brings that rigor to AI tools.

PRINCIPLES 6 core positions

Principles

The problem comes first

When you understand the problem, you can measure every solution against it. Skip this, and you have no way to know if what you built actually works.

Protect user autonomy

Dark patterns exploit psychological vulnerabilities to make people act against their own interests. Recognize these patterns while you're still designing, before they reach anyone.

Ground decisions in evidence

Your assumptions about users are usually wrong. Evidence lets you find out before you build, instead of after you ship.

Systems over screens

The purpose of a system is what it does. If your system produces a confusing experience, that confusion is the design. Fixing screens without fixing the system underneath changes nothing.

Design for everyone

A billion people worldwide have a disability. When accessibility shapes decisions from the start, the product works better for all users.

Question the brief

The way a problem is framed contains hidden assumptions. Challenging them is how you avoid building the right solution to the wrong problem.

15 SKILLS 7 categories

Skills

Foundation
/intent
Strategy & Research
/blueprint/investigate/strategize
Experience Design
/articulate/journey/organize
Quality & Evaluation
/evaluate/fortify/include
Adaptation & Context
/localize/transpose
Measurement
/measure
Cross-cutting
/philosopher
Handoff
/specify

View all skills with details →

ANTI-PATTERNS 9 categories · 52+ patterns

Anti-Patterns

Pattern Severity Category
Bait and Switch Critical Deceptive Patterns
Fake Countdown Timers Critical Urgency & Scarcity Fabrication
Infinite Scroll Medium Addictive Design
Anthropomorphic Manipulation High AI-Specific Dark Patterns
Prechecked Consent Critical Prechecked & Default Manipulation
Dead Ends Medium Common UX Failures

Browse all anti-patterns →

INSTALL 4 platforms

Install

Claude Code

claude install-skill ghaida/intent

Cursor

Download the .cursor rules and add to your project's .cursor/rules/ directory.

VS Code Copilot

Download the copilot instructions and add to .github/copilot/.

Manual

Clone the repo and copy skills/ into your project. Each skill is a standalone markdown file.
